login.title: Platform admin
login.subtitle: Cross-company control plane · platform admins only
login.invalid: Wrong email or password, or this account is not a platform admin

noAccess.title: No platform access
noAccess.desc: This account is not a platform admin and cannot access the cross-company control plane.

datasets.title: Public datasets
datasets.desc: Read-only across all companies once uploaded.
datasets.name: Name
datasets.emptyDesc: Click "New dataset" to create one, then upload a CSV version.
datasets.uploadHint: Optional; pick a CSV file to upload as the first version.
datasets.deleteConfirm: Delete "{{name}}"? It will no longer be visible to any company.

settings.title: Platform settings
settings.desc: Runtime settings take effect immediately; items marked restart or read-only can't be changed online.

fields.signup.tenant_enabled: When on, visitors can self-provision a new company from the sign-in page; when off, companies can only be provisioned by platform admins here (recommended off for cloud).
fields.signup.default_plan: Subscription tier applied by default when a company is self-provisioned or created here (sets that company's quota limits).
fields.auth.default_tenant: Sign-in fallback. Company resolution order is: email lookup (emails are globally unique, usually a hit) → subdomain → this default. Rarely needed on cloud SaaS — leave blank; mainly for a single-company on-prem install, where setting it lets users sign in with just email + password.
fields.auth.tenant_host_suffix: Domain suffix for mapping subdomains to companies — e.g. set dms.app and acme.dms.app resolves to company acme. Only needed for subdomain-per-company deployments; cloud resolves by email, so usually left blank.
fields.branding.product_name: Product name shown on the sign-in page, sidebar and throughout the UI.
fields.storage.backend: File storage backend (e.g. local fs / object storage). Deployment-level; hot-swapping would orphan existing files, so it is read-only — change it via a redeploy.
fields.storage.root: Root path / object-storage bucket for files. Deployment-level and read-only — changing it requires a redeploy and data migration.

tenantSettings.title: Company settings
tenantSettings.desc: Override a setting for this company only (shallow-merged into the company's settings).

overview.title: Platform overview
overview.desc: Companies, usage and license status across the platform.

tenants.title: Companies
tenants.subtitle: Provision, adjust quotas, suspend or restore companies.
tenants.emptyDesc: Click "Provision company" to create the first one.

create.title: Provision company
create.planHint: Selecting a plan applies its default quotas; you can adjust them on the detail page afterward.

lifecycle.title: Company status
lifecycle.suspendDesc: Once suspended, all users in this company cannot sign in or read/write.
lifecycle.activateDesc: Once restored, users in this company can sign in again.
lifecycle.suspendConfirm: Suspend "{{name}}"? All its users will be unable to sign in.
lifecycle.activateConfirm: Restore "{{name}}"? Its users will be able to sign in again.
